Notes: Set up mid.campus.edu. as an empty non-terminal via a descendant RR only. The UPDATE uses a name-level prerequisite on the empty non-terminal and then creates a TXT RRset there, exposing whether the server treats the empty non-terminal as name_in_use or name_absent / NXRRSET-relevant.

Steps.Description: Require mid.campus.edu. to be in use, and require its TXT RRset to be absent, then add the TXT RR there.

Steps.Name: mid.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the TXT RRset was created after the UPDATE.
